data.title: US-listed company Watson Financial plans to deploy a cryptocurrency treasury strategy and establish an advisory committee
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Waton Financial announced the establishment of a cryptocurrency advisory committee to develop its treasury strategy. The advisory committee will guide Waton's strategic expansion into the cryptocurrency sector, overseeing and evaluating all cryptocurrency projects, including providing crypto reserves, digital asset libraries, and institutional-grade solutions for clients seeking to invest in cryptocurrencies and tokenized assets. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Anti-fraud company SEON completes $80 million Series C financing, led by Sixth Street Growth
data.description: Anti-fraud company SEON announced the completion of an $80 million Series C financing round, led by Sixth Street Growth, with participation from IVP, Creandum, Firebolt and new investor Hearst. The new round of financing brings SEON's total financing to $187 million, including a $94 million Series B financing round raised in 2022. The company's two founders once established a cryptocurrency platform that supports fiat currency transactions in Central and Eastern Europe. SEON will also cope with the increasingly complex digital environment in related fields. Currently, SEON serves customers in various industries, including cryptocurrencies, games, financial institutions, and e-commerce. Its customers include Patreon, Revolut, NuBank, Ladbrokes, Air France, and KLM. With the help of new funds, they hope to reach more customers and provide them with effective but budget-friendly fraud prevention solutions. (Techfundingnews)

data.title: Binance Wallet Aspecta BuildKey Mode TGE Phase 1 to Launch RIVER
data.description: The first Binance Wallet Aspecta BuildKey TGE will list Riverdot Inc (RIVER). Eligible users must use Alpha Points to participate. Details and event entry will be announced soon. BuildKey subscription period: September 19, 2025, 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM (UTC+8); BuildKey trading period: September 19, 2025, 5:00 PM – September 22, 2025, 5:00 PM (UTC+8); TGE & BuildKey exchange period: September 22, 2025, 5:00 PM (UTC+8). Note that token prices will fluctuate during a Bonding Curve-based TGE. The Bonding Curve liquidity pool will maintain its liquidity for a period after the TGE, but liquidity may decline over time.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending September 13 was 231,000, while the expected number was 240,000.
data.description: Initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 13th were 231,000, compared to expectations of 240,000 and revised from 263,000 to 264,000. Continuing claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 6th were 1.92 million, compared to expectations of 1.95 million and revised from 1.939 million to 1.927 million. The four-week moving average of initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 13th was 240,000, revised from 240,500 to 240,750. (Jinshi)

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation spent approximately $2 million to purchase 7.5 million DOGE
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of President Trump, has invested in a Nasdaq-listed company called Thumzup Media Corporation, which holds cryptocurrency reserves. The company announced it has spent approximately $2 million to purchase 7.5 million DOGE, adding Dogecoin to its strategic reserves. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Jupiter: Currently the third largest Solana validator
data.description: Jupiter announced on the X platform that it has become the third largest Solana validator, having previously disclosed that it has staked 2.5 million SOL.

data.title: BNB contract holdings across the network exceeded $2 billion, setting a new record.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that the total BNB contract holdings on the entire network have increased to 2.0906 million, with a holding market value exceeding US$2 billion, currently reported at US$2.077 billion, continuing to set a new historical high, with an increase of 13.91% in the past 24 hours; among them, Binance BNB contract holdings reached 982,300, ranking first, with a holding market value of US$976 million, a 24-hour increase of 9.67%.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Corporation is listed on the U.S. over-the-counter securities exchange (OTC Markets).
data.description: Bitcoin Treasury Corporation, a Canada-based Bitcoin Treasury company, announced that it has listed on the regulated U.S. over-the-counter (OTC) Markets under the ticker symbol "BTCFF," with U.S. investors now able to access financial disclosures and real-time Level 2 quotes. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Binance Launches BNB New High Celebration Event with $800,000 in Prize Pool
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance is celebrating BNB's all-time high with two promotions offering a total prize pool of $800,000. Promotion A is open to new users; those who register and complete KYC can receive up to $10 in BNB, with a total prize pool of $300,000. Promotion B is open to existing users who haven't traded yet; those who complete designated tasks can share in up to $500,000 in SIGN tokens. The promotion runs from 12:00 PM on September 18, 2025, to 11:59 PM on October 8, 2025 (UTC). (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council: The Federal Reserve made a compromise and prudent decision
data.description: Kevin Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council, said the Federal Reserve took a compromise approach in yesterday's interest rate decision and made a "prudent decision." Hassett is reportedly one of the possible candidates for Federal Reserve Chairman considered by US President Trump. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trust Wallet Releases Token Economics Litepaper, Plans to Increase TWT Holder Returns Through Pre-TGE Airdrops and Trust Alpha
data.description: According to official news, Trust Wallet has released the token economics Litepaper, which plans to increase the returns of TWT holders through pre-TGE airdrops and Trust Alpha. The relevant TWT practical benefits are planned to be launched in phases within the next 6 months, and the first batch of updates are scheduled to be released in the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Stellar: Circle Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol CCTP V2 is about to be launched
data.description: According to official news, Stellar announced that the Circle cross-chain transfer protocol CCTP V 2 will be launched soon. This upgrade will enhance the transfer function of USDC in the Stellar ecosystem. Currently, the Stellar ecosystem already supports natively issued USDC.

data.title: LM Funding America acquires Bitcoin mining facility for $4 million
data.description: LM Funding America, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, announced it has acquired a Bitcoin mining facility from Greenidge Generation Holdings for $4 million. The acquisition also includes approximately 2,300 Bitmain S19 series mining machines. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Solana's DFDV Launches Treasury Accelerator Program
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Solana's publicly traded company DFDV has announced the launch of its Treasury Accelerator program. This initiative will utilize the company's balance sheet to fund other digital asset treasuries (DATs), offering between $5 million to $75 million in additional deployment. The funding will be provided in cash or in physical SOL.

Any appreciation from these investments is expected to be reinvested in purchasing additional SOL, thereby increasing the company's inventory holdings.

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Drop Significantly, Reversing Previous Surge
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Department of Labor reported a decrease in initial unemployment claims by 33,000 to 231,000 for the week ending September 13. This marks the largest decline in nearly four years, reversing the sharp increase observed the previous week and aligning with the low layoff levels in the economy. A Bloomberg survey of economists had predicted a median of 240,000 claims. Additionally, the number of continuing claims fell to 1.92 million in the preceding week.

data.title: Robinhood US plans to list CRV
data.description: According to market news: Robinhood US plans to launch CRV.

data.title: Bakkt abandons acquisition of the “bitcoin.jp” domain
data.description: Bakkt, a digital asset trading platform listed on the New York Stock Exchange, announced it has abandoned its acquisition of the "bitcoin.jp" domain name and is instead pursuing "bitcoin.co.jp." This follows news that Bakkt has reached a share purchase agreement with RIZAP Group to acquire Tokyo-listed MarushoHotta for an undisclosed sum. This acquisition will make Bakkt the largest shareholder of MHT. In conjunction with this transaction, Bakkt will acquire the website domain "bitcoin.jp," which will become the new name of MHT upon approval by MHT shareholders. (Businesswire)

data.title: White House economic adviser Hassett declines to say when Fed chair nominee will be announced
data.description: White House economic adviser Hassett refused to say when the nomination for Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced. (Jinshi)

data.title: The DeAgentAI Genesis airdrop has been launched, and the main staking event will start on September 22nd.
data.description: According to official news, DeAgentAI, the leading AI project in the Sui ecosystem, announced that its Genesis Airdrop has officially started distribution today and is expected to be completed within 48 hours. Its main staking system will be officially launched at 15:00 UTC time on September 22 (23:00 Beijing time). The system has three modules designed for different users: including "current multi-reward pool", "regular golden shovel pool", and "community exclusive arena" based on Discord identity.

data.title: Bybit Web3 24-hour market: Two tokens surge over 40%, with LLM leading the gains at 47%.
data.description: According to Bybit Web 3's current "hot coin capture" data, Web 3 market performance has been outstanding in the past 24 hours, among which two popular coins have recorded significant gains: - LLM rose 47% - BITTY rose 42%
